title: justicia panduriformis
intro: Justicia panduriformis, also known as the Indian shot or justicia, is a flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia panduriformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparation of Justicia panduriformis is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
